title: Junior Investment Banker at ICICI Direct Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at ICICI Direct Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct Holdings Services in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct Holdings Services:
ICICI Direct Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct Holdings Services!
